title: Air India Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Air India Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Air India Cargo family as a Warehouse Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Air India Cargo:
Air India Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
